ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team participates in */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* URLs to the team's social media profiles */,
  "team_squad_size" INTEGER /* Number of players in the squad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "association" TEXT /* Referee association */,
  "rating" REAL /* Referee rating */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "career_start" TEXT /* Year the referee started their career */,
  "career_highlights" TEXT /* Notable achievements or events in the referee's career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of betting odds */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match for which the odds are provided */,
  "bookmaker" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker providing the odds */,
  "home_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for the home team to win */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds for the match to end in a draw */,
  "away_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for the away team to win */,
  "over_2_5_goals_odds" REAL /* Odds for the total goals scored to be over 2.5 */,
  "under_2_5_goals_odds" REAL /* Odds for the total goals scored to be under 2.5 */,
  "home亚洲盘赔率" TEXT /* Asian handicap odds for the home team */,
  "draw亚洲盘赔率" TEXT /* Asian handicap odds for a draw */,
  "away亚洲盘赔率" TEXT /* Asian handicap odds for the away team */,
  "home_欧洲赔率" REAL /* European handicap odds for the home team */,
  "draw_欧洲赔率" REAL /* European handicap odds for a draw */,
  "away_欧洲赔率" REAL /* European handicap odds for the away team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the odds were updated */,
  "betting_volume" INTEGER /* Total amount of bets placed on this match */,
  "home_team_odds_change" REAL /* Change in home team odds since the last update */,
  "draw_odds_change" REAL /* Change in draw odds since the last update */,
  "away_team_odds_change" REAL /* Change in away team odds since the last update */,
  "over_2_5_goals_odds_change" REAL /* Change in over 2.5 goals odds since the last update */,
  "under_2_5_goals_odds_change" REAL /* Change in under 2.5 goals odds since the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_bookmaker FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information of the bookmaker */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the bookmaker */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the bookmaker was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the bookmaker's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the bookmaker's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URLs to the bookmaker's social media profiles */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees at the bookmaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, bettor, admin) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Preferences of the user (e.g., favorite teams, notification settings) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user (e.g., male, female) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "total_bets_placed" INTEGER /* Total number of bets placed by the user */,
  "total_bets_won" INTEGER /* Total number of bets won by the user */,
  "total_bets_lost" INTEGER /* Total number of bets lost by the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "following" TEXT /* List of user IDs that the user is following */,
  "followers" TEXT /* List of user IDs who are following the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, bet, analyze) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match analyzed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who provided the insights */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "insight" TEXT /* Insights or conclusions drawn from the match data */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the analysis quality */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., pre-match, in-match, post-match) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis (0-1) */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source of data used for the analysis (e.g., match statistics, historical data) */,
  "analysis_views" INTEGER /* Number of times the analysis has been viewed */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the analysis has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the analysis has received */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_analysis_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
